RIDGE HAVEN REPORT TO THE TWENTY-NINETH GENERAL ASSEMBLY PRESBYTERIAN CHURCH IN AMERICA

Ridge Haven exists as a camp, conference, retreat center, and residential community to proclaim the gospel to the lost, nurture God’s people in the truth of God’s word, and provide a place of rest, refuge, and renewal so that God is glorified and God’s people are challenged and equipped for service and ministry in His kingdom. – The Ridge Haven Purpose Statement

Ridge Haven
More than you can imagine
and better than you remember!

The following words of testimony and many others are multiplied each year more than 8000 times. Surely the Lord has blessed the PCA with the extraordinary resource of Ridge Haven!

Kennedy Smartt was awesome!! Dean was great! I loved the Kirk Ward band! – YoWAW student.

God has spoken clearly to me in ways that perhaps a seminar was never intended to do; the power of His word is clearly evident! But what is really tremendous is when God uses these dynamic young people to minister and convict us old people! It is such an encouragement to see such great kids in one place. YoWAW has found a great balance; and the young people respond to it with hearts that don’t soon forget what God has revealed to him. Thank you, thank you for your dedication, your servants’ hearts, your labors – we pray for you and thank God for you!! – YoWAW adult leader.

This time at Ridge Haven has been a time of spiritual refreshment for me. The interaction with God’s people from many places has been rich and encouraging... It has been a blessing! – Covenant Family Conference.

Keenagers is the highlight of our year. We look forward to it each year... It is a week of spiritual growth and rest as we sit under the ministry of our Lord through all of you at Ridge Haven. It is truly a haven for the weary soul and a time of refreshing and building us up to continue the ministries we are called to in our local churches. – Keenager Conference.

<a id="ga29-p624"></a>
<!-- PAGE ga=29 pdf_page=626 printed_page=624 -->

Our lives and marriage were greatly enriched by the sharing of information from the speakers, enhanced by such a peaceful, enjoyable setting, and the fellowship of other Christian couples. A place and event we will recommend to others... – Love Life Marriage Seminar.

You probably don't know who I am but I have been going to Ridge Haven camps since I was in the third grade. I am a senior this year and attended my last Ridge Haven camp, the winter ski retreat, this past week... Thank you for all of the hard work you have put in Ridge Haven... After each camp I have attended, I have gone home encouraged and better prepared to be a strong Christian in my community, my school, and in my home. I have also made some of my best friends and experienced some of my best times while at Ridge Haven... – Camper.

We wanted you to know how very much we appreciate our stay...this past week. This truly has been a time of renewal and refreshment for us. Please know that the work you do in providing this possibility for Christian brothers and sisters is so important in living during this time in history... This place has been rest and solace to our weary souls and bodies. – An individual guest.

## Present needs and challenges:

### Prayer

- For the ministries of Ridge Haven including summer camps and the great variety of conferences.
- For the Lord to continue to use His word to save man, and sanctify, encourage, comfort, renew, challenge, and call many into ministry generation to generation.
- For staffing and the staff for continuing ability to be faithful, diligent, and healthy for serving the Lord and all those whom He brings to Ridge Haven.
- For growth in the number of people we seek to serve.
- For an increase in partnership share giving by the churches of the PCA from 23% to 50%.
- For the timely provision of the $250,000 needed to complete the water system upgrades mandated by the State of North Carolina.
- For the timely completion of the water system upgrades.
- For Ridge Haven’s ability to move ahead with a site development plan.
- For wisdom, planning, and resources in the addition of two new conferences.

### Participation

- In partnership share giving (We need an improvement from 23% last year to a minimum of 50%).

<a id="ga29-p625"></a>
<!-- PAGE ga=29 pdf_page=627 printed_page=625 -->

• In Ridge Haven sponsored cam ps and conferences helping us to reach
our goals of ...

1,400 for summer camps
350 for the Year-end Blast camp
50 couples for the Love Life Seminar
50 families for the Covenant Family Conference
400 for the two K eenager Conferences

• By presbyteries, churches, families, and the A ssem bly’s Committees and
agencies helping us to reach our goal of 8,500 guests this year.
